text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a number of wins under Gold Ship's belt, we
have some time to bask in the victorious
afterglow. However, the lull doesn't last long.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: DANG IT!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't master this technique... I've been trying so
hard, but I just can't nail the shadow clone jutsu!
choice_data_list: Shadow clones? Where did I hear that before?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, she did say something about shadow
clones when she won the ticket for a hot spring
vacation in that raffle.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It was supposed to be epic! The plan was to have
twice the fun with my shadow clone, but alas!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I just can't do it! And the ticket expires real soon!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste! I'm going on vacation,
and you're coming with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I'm off on an extremely
spur-of-the-moment hot spring vacation with
Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things are going pretty well on the train ride to
the inn. At least, until I turn to my side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's when I discover the seat where Gold Ship should be sitting is empty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't answer any of my messages, so I get
off the train at the next stop and call her.
Thankfully, she picks up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: "Hey, Trainer. It's about time you called."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"Walk 500 paces south from the station, then go
700 paces east. I'll see you there. Later."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The line goes dead. I try calling her back again
and again, but it won't go through...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The instant I reach the spot she indicated, my
phone suddenly rings out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"Sup. Now go 700 paces north and 1,200 paces
west. See you there. Later."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She hangs up on me again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Once more, I follow her directions right to...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've done well to make it this far, traveler.
Your journey must have been difficult.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Many monsters roam these parts. The peril is
grave, so please rest here for the night.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Get inside. Quick, before you become a monster's
dinner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what's going on, but since I can't
simply leave Gold Ship to her own devices, I step
inside the inn.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You must be famished from your long journey.
Fear not—a meal has already been prepared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fantasy innkeeper act doesn't drop even after
we're inside. I get the feeling she won't stop even
if I don't play along, so I humor her.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here we have vegetable tempura, vegetable miso
soup, and steamed vegetables. Everything was
harvested in the nearby mountains.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Next, we have vegetable sashimi, flame-roasted
vegetables, soy sauce simmered vegetables, and,
for the adventurous, live vegetables straight from
the earth.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to take a dip in the hot spring when
you're done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After eating my veggie-packed dinner, I make my
way to the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sit down in the massive bath. But then, out of
nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kraaaw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A cry like no animal I've ever heard echoes
through the night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My pulse hasn't even had the time to settle down
when I'm hit with another shock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: THUD!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The air trembles with the violent noise! Terrified, I
jump out of the bath as quickly as I can.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: That was a close call.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But fear not. The kraw bird has gone yonder.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You'll be safe inside the inn. Please, relax to your
heart's content.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I shall also retire for the night. Have a good rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm back in my room now, but I've still got no idea
what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The confounding situation has thoroughly
exhausted me, and I drift to sleep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Gold Ship and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together...
Maybe. Who knows?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I wake up, the first thing I see is Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Let's kick things off with some super
stretches!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What're you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We never left in the first place, so how can we be
"back"? Quit messing around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Was all of that just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when I check my inbox a few days
later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's an email from an unknown sender that
reads, "Thank you for visiting our inn."
